rationale: Implements all three changes from the PR body in `index.html`. (1) Category reordering: adds `.reorder-btns` CSS, `moveCat(i, dir)` that swaps array elements, and prepends up/down arrow buttons in `renderCategories` via `'<div class="reorder-btns">'`. (2) Finance Types management: introduces a `financeTypes` array seeded from localStorage (`fhd_financeTypes`) defaulting to the previously hardcoded 11-entry list, adds a `Manage Types` card with `finTypeList` and `newFinTypeName`, defines `renderFinanceTypes()` that drives `finType`/`filterFinType`/`editFinTypeSelect` selects plus `addFinType`/`removeFinType`/`moveFinType`. The previously hardcoded `<option>` blocks under `finType`, `filterFinType`, and `editFinTypeSelect` are now empty selects populated dynamically. The edit modal handles orphaned types by appending the missing type as a selected option (`if (!financeTypes.includes(entry.type))`). The version badge bumps from `v14` to `v15`. (3) PDF upload: the worker source is set immediately after the pdf.js library loads via an inline `<script>` block, `handlePDFUpload` only sets it as a fallback (`if (!pdfjsLib.GlobalWorkerOptions.workerSrc)`), the `<input type="file">` accept attribute now includes MIME types (`.csv,.pdf,application/pdf,text/csv`), and the file reader is wrapped in `try/catch` with `toast(..., true)` for visible error display. All changes match the PR's stated goals.
